pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 4.0.1 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x does not fully support Java 21 as the baseline; Spring Boot 4.x is required for native Java 21 compatibility and access to new features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc to adapt to Spring Boot 4 dependency structure.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 restructures web starters; using the old starter may cause missing classes or conflicts with the new MVC implementation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-test with spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test to adapt to Spring Boot 4 testing dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 changes test starter artifacts; the old starter may not include necessary test utilities for the new webmvc stack.
